findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "status_code_info" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "all" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: is_valid_slug, get_email_pattern, get_url_pattern, get_slug_pattern, fortune_cookie · Private data: generate_password, generate_token, validate_password_strength, jwt_decode, file_checksum_guide, password_entropy, analyze_password, generate_password_2, estimate_hash_time, is_common_password, suggest_improvements, leetspeak_password, generate_memorable, is_private_ip, private_ip_ranges, get_password_pattern, random_password · Public sink: extract_emails, validate_email, get_email_pattern, generate_emails, random_email · Destructive: truncate, truncate_2, remove_whitespace, bytes_to_human, format_date, json_minify, json_prettify, identify_hash, prettify_json, remove_duplicate_words, remove_query_param, format_number, format_currency, format_percentage, format_ordinal, format_bytes, format_phone, format_credit_card, format_ssn, format_duration, format_relative_time, format_truncate, format_list, ipv4_to_ipv6_2, array_compact, array_dedupe.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: is_valid_slug, get_email_pattern, get_url_pattern, get_slug_pattern, fortune_cookie · Private data: generate_password, generate_token, validate_password_strength, jwt_decode, file_checksum_guide, password_entropy, analyze_password, generate_password_2, estimate_hash_time, is_common_password, suggest_improvements, leetspeak_password, generate_memorable, is_private_ip, private_ip_ranges, get_password_pattern, random_password · Public sink: extract_emails, validate_email, get_email_pattern, generate_emails, random_email · Destructive: truncate, truncate_2, remove_whitespace, bytes_to_human, format_date, json_minify, json_prettify, identify_hash, prettify_json, remove_duplicate_words, remove_query_param, format_number, format_currency, format_percentage, format_ordinal, format_bytes, format_phone, format_credit_card, format_ssn, format_duration, format_relative_time, format_truncate, format_list, ipv4_to_ipv6_2, array_compact, array_dedupe

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
